author: Sergey Pekarchik
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc2: Burning transforms it into a Burned Paper Block, but it may be completely destroyed
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc3: A Burned Paper Block, if not burning, attracts creepers within a 70-block radius
item.compactmod.paperblock.desc4: Breaking a Burned Paper Block drops nothing
item.compactmod.burning_paperblock.desc1: Can be obtained by burning a Paper Block
item.compactmod.burning_paperblock.desc2: If not burning, attracts creepers within a 70-block radius
item.compactmod.burning_paperblock.desc4: Cannot be harvested with a Silk Touch tool
